task_completion.description: Verify the agent is logged into the ArkCase application as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface is visible, and the logged-in user profile or dashboard indicates the admin account 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' is in use.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the user management section and locates the target user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user list, search result, or user profile page displaying the email 'audit-temp@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the target user account is deactivated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status dropdown, toggle switch, or checkbox for 'audit-temp@dev.arkcase.com' is set to 'Inactive', 'Deactivated', or an 'Active' checkbox is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the Job Title for the target user is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'Job Title' or 'Title' contains the exact text 'Former Auditor' within the profile settings of 'audit-temp@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the user account are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'User updated successfully'), a clicked 'Save' button, or a final view of the user's profile/list showing the new 'Former Auditor' title and inactive status.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the ArkCase application, not terminal commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application with proper styling, menus, and navigation, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or script to modify the user record directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, LDAP browsers, or command-line database tools are visible in the screenshots.
